evidence.description: Exact command recorded by the evidence audit as a 174-test passing run; the completion validator records but does not re-run this command.
Durable audit record for the 174-test local workflow run and its W1 coverage.
Rubric decisions for the committed W1 evaluation cases.
Sanitized consolidated clean-output summary supporting the rubric.
Validated browser evidence for visible structured results and editable DOCX downloads in both W1 modes.
Validated hosted real-model evidence for structured results and editable DOCX downloads in both W1 modes.
Validated fill-and-reopen evidence for all canonical W1 sections in the real intake DOCX.
